title: ErrorReply
description: Generic shape for error replies on the channel (status="error" phx_reply).

reason.description: Short machine-readable error code. Known values: `body_too_large`, `unauthorized_read`, `unauthorized_write`, `project_mismatch`, `rate_limited`, `bad_topic`.

retry_after_ms.description: Present when `reason == rate_limited`. Milliseconds until the current rate bucket resets.
